explorer.heading: Explore the future of industrial operations

items.label: Electrification
items.title: Power the world with lower emissions
items.description: As a global leader in electrical distribution, we accelerate decarbonization and energy efficiency — connecting generation, storage, and consumption into one intelligent grid.
items.alt: Technician in safety gear working in an industrial facility

items.label: Automation
items.title: Connect machines, data, and people
items.description: Digital transformation reshapes how industries operate. Our automation platforms improve productivity, reliability, and safety across the most complex operations on earth.
items.alt: Automated manufacturing line in a modern factory

items.label: Life Sciences
items.title: The plant of the future starts here
items.description: Maximize profitability while maintaining compliance. Forward-thinking companies build plants with safe, sustainable operations — future-proofed against regulatory and market pressures.
items.alt: Professional in cleanroom suit in a life sciences facility

items.label: Renewable Power
items.title: Scale clean generation with confidence
items.description: Wind, solar, and hybrid solutions are scaling faster than ever. We help operators integrate clean generation while maintaining grid stability and peak performance.

items.label: Robotics
items.title: Extend human capability with precision
items.description: Intelligent robotics combine sensing, motion control, and software to automate demanding tasks — extending what teams can achieve in the most challenging environments.
items.alt: Robotic arm operating in an industrial workspace

items.label: Digital Twin
items.title: See your operations before they happen
items.description: Mirror physical assets in real time. Simulate scenarios, predict failures, and optimize performance across your entire value chain from a single digital command center.
